title: In board image viewer
excerpt: I would love an app or column time that would provide a way to browse images in a certain row (like a shadowbox image viewer). For example if you are including pictures of different rooms or properties, you can browse th…

posts.author: Speters (Sabreena)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love an app or column time that would provide a way to browse images in a certain row (like a shadowbox image viewer). For example if you are including pictures of different rooms or properties, you can browse through them from the board.
